name: csnl-paper-archive-interview
description: Per-researcher interactive interview over the CSNL paper archive. Verifies the researcher's profile, walks a pre-computed top-N queue (recent / mid / classic age chunks), records save-for-later / not-relevant / already-read / explain-more choices, runs a meta-review every 10 answers, and pushes everything to Postgres (csnl_paper_rec.archive_*).
author: CSNL (Center for Computational Social Neuroscience, Korea University)
